inSignal.description: Input signal name or slate expression.

inSignalDisable.description: Signal name that disables this listener.

outSignals.description: Signals emitted after this listener fires.

node.description: QuestNode run when the signal condition fires.

signalListenMode.description: SlateRef<SignalListenMode?>. Allowed SignalListenMode literals: OngoingOnly, NotYetAcceptedOnly, OngoingOrNotYetAccepted, HistoricalOnly, Always; also accepts $varName.
